item.title: Exploring the Cheapest Boeing 737
item.description: Not all 737s cost millions—some are surprisingly affordable. What condition are these bargain jets in, and what hidden costs come with them?

media:content.media:title: Exploring the Cheapest Boeing 737
media:content.media:description: Not all 737s cost millions—some are surprisingly affordable. What condition are these bargain jets in, and what hidden costs come with them?

item.title: Hidden Gem: 300mph Airplane Resurfaces in a Barn!
item.description: Forgotten for years, a 300mph airplane emerges from storage. What secrets does this barn‑find reveal about aviation history?

media:content.media:title: Hidden Gem: 300mph Airplane Resurfaces in a Barn!
media:content.media:description: Forgotten for years, a 300mph airplane emerges from storage. What secrets does this barn‑find reveal about aviation history?

item.title: Buzz Aldrin’s Jet Hasn’t Flown in Years
item.description: Once owned by a space legend, this jet has sat silent for decades. What condition is it in today, and could it ever take to the skies again?

media:content.media:title: Buzz Aldrin’s Jet Hasn’t Flown in Years
media:content.media:description: Once owned by a space legend, this jet has sat silent for decades. What condition is it in today, and could it ever take to the skies again?

item.title: Reviving Elvis Presley’s Jet | A Journey of Dollars and Dreams
item.description: Elvis’s private jet once symbolized rock‑and‑roll luxury. Now, restoration efforts face the challenge of cost and ambition. Will this journey of dollars and dreams bring the King’s jet back to glory?

media:content.media:title: Reviving Elvis Presley’s Jet | A Journey of Dollars and Dreams
media:content.media:description: Elvis’s private jet once symbolized rock‑and‑roll luxury. Now, restoration efforts face the challenge of cost and ambition. Will this journey of dollars and dreams bring the King’s jet back to glory?

item.title: The Truth About My Emergency Landing
item.description: An unexpected crisis forced a dramatic landing. What really happened in the cockpit, and how close did it come to disaster?

media:content.media:title: The Truth About My Emergency Landing
media:content.media:description: An unexpected crisis forced a dramatic landing. What really happened in the cockpit, and how close did it come to disaster?

item.title: Will It Start After Years?
item.description: An abandoned aircraft sits silent for decades. Can it roar back to life after years of neglect, or has time claimed it for good?

media:content.media:title: Will It Start After Years?
media:content.media:description: An abandoned aircraft sits silent for decades. Can it roar back to life after years of neglect, or has time claimed it for good?

item.title: Rebuilding a 79-year-old abandoned airplane
item.description: Nearly eight decades of neglect could not keep this aircraft grounded forever. Watch the full restoration journey of a 79-year-old airplane brought carefully back to airworthy condition. Would you take on a restoration project like this?

media:content.media:title: Rebuilding a 79-year-old abandoned airplane
media:content.media:description: Nearly eight decades of neglect could not keep this aircraft grounded forever. Watch the full restoration journey of a 79-year-old airplane brought carefully back to airworthy condition. Would you take on a restoration project like this?

item.title: Attempting to start Buzz Aldrin's long-dormant jet
item.description: A private jet once owned by moon landing legend Buzz Aldrin has sat idle for years — and someone decided to find out if it still had life in it. A fascinating attempt to wake up a piece of aviation history. Do you think it started?

media:content.media:title: Attempting to start Buzz Aldrin's long-dormant jet
media:content.media:description: A private jet once owned by moon landing legend Buzz Aldrin has sat idle for years — and someone decided to find out if it still had life in it. A fascinating attempt to wake up a piece of aviation history. Do you think it started?

item.title: Why the Aztec Is My Favorite
item.description: Among countless aircraft, the Aztec stands out. What makes this twin‑engine classic a personal favorite, and how does it earn its reputation?

media:content.media:title: Why the Aztec Is My Favorite
media:content.media:description: Among countless aircraft, the Aztec stands out. What makes this twin‑engine classic a personal favorite, and how does it earn its reputation?
